title: Doom Music Disc
description: This mod adds a music disc with the classic Doom Eternal song "The Only Thing They Fear Is You"
body:
## The Classic Doom Eternal song "The Only Thing They Fear Is You."

> **"You can't just shoot a hole into the surface of Mars" - Someone from DOOM Eternal probably**


The music disc spawns in Nether Fortress chests and can also be obtained through the creative inventory!

- Please report any bugs in the Discord Server! Thank you!
